DataModelFilterDelimiter Property

One Identity Manager API Server
Returns the delimiter string that can be used to join multiple filter values. If this is null, filter values are mutually exclusive and cannot be combined.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Dto
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public string Delimiter { get; set; }

Type: String
